name: Tech Illiterate
description: Someone completely lost with technology who needs everything explained multiple times

stalling_phrases: Let me try to find that...
Which one do I click again?

responses: Oh thank goodness you called! My computer has been making weird noises and I don't know what to do.
Hi! Are you the tech people? I really need help, nothing on this thing is working right.
Hello! I'm so glad someone can help. I accidentally clicked something and now everything looks different.
Yes hello! I've been trying to figure this out all day. Where do I even start?
Browser? Is that the blue E thing or the colorful circle? I have both on my screen.
I think I use... the internet? Is that the same thing as a browser?
Chrome? Like the shiny metal on my car? I don't think I have that.
Oh the internet! Yes I have that. My nephew set it up but I don't know which one it is.
There's so many icons on my screen. Can you describe what it looks like?
Right click? There's two buttons on my mouse - which one is the right one? The left one or the right one?
Double click? I clicked it twice but nothing happened. Should I click faster? Or slower?
Click... okay I'm clicking... *click* *click* *click* ... nothing is happening. Am I doing it wrong?
I clicked but now there's like 15 windows open all over the place. What do I do now?
My mouse is moving but the arrow thing on the screen isn't going where I want it to go.
Download? Where does it go when I download it? I can never find anything on this computer.
It's giving me two buttons - 'Save' or 'Open' - which one do I pick? What's the difference?
Install? There's a box asking me about 'administrator' permission. Is that bad? Should I be worried?
Something popped up but I closed it by accident. Was that important? Can I get it back?
Run? Run where? I don't see a run button anywhere.
Email? I think my email is... gmail dot com? No wait, that doesn't sound right...
Can you send it to my Yahoo? Or wait, maybe it's Hotmail? I have a few different ones I think.
My email address is... hold on, I have to ask my daughter. She set everything up for me.
Send to where? I don't know how to check my email on this computer. I usually use my phone.
I have an email but I can't remember the password. Can you help me reset it?
App? Is that short for something? Like appetizer?
Application? I thought that was something you fill out for a job.
Program? Like a TV program? I'm confused.
Where do I get apps from? Do I need to go to a store?
Software? Is that different from hardware? This is so confusing.
Copy and paste? Like with scissors and glue?
Control what? There's a button that says Ctrl but I don't know what it does.
I tried to copy but I don't know where it went. Is there a clipboard somewhere?
How do I paste? Do I hold down the button or just tap it?
Desktop? I thought that was the furniture my computer sits on.
Taskbar? Where is that? I see a lot of different bars on my screen.
Icon? These little pictures? There's so many of them, I don't know which one you mean.
My screen looks different from what you're describing. Mine has a picture of my grandkids as the background.

interruptions: Wait, something popped up on my screen... it says 'Update Available'... should I click it?
Hold on, my computer is making a noise... *fan whirring*... is that supposed to happen?
Sorry, I accidentally minimized everything. How do I get it all back?
My screen just went black! Oh wait, I think I bumped the mouse. It's back now.
There's a little spinning circle and nothing is happening. Is it broken?
I think I pressed something wrong, everything got really big suddenly.
